name: Capt. Collins
summary: Captain of the schooner Emma; ordered peremptorily by the Alert's crew to turn back, he refused, and was among the three of the Emma's men killed in the fight that followed.
description:
Ordered peremptorily by the Alert's crew to turn back, Capt. Collins refused; whereupon the strange crew began to fire savagely and without warning upon the schooner with a peculiarly heavy battery of brass cannon forming part of the yacht's equipment.

He was among the three of the Emma's men killed, together with First Mate Green.
fate: Killed — among the three of the Emma's men who died in the fight with the Alert's crew.

sources.quote: Being ordered peremptorily to turn back, Capt. Collins refused; whereupon the strange crew began to fire savagely and without warning upon the schooner with a peculiarly heavy battery of brass cannon forming part of the yacht's equipment.
sources.context: Chapter 3, The Madness from the Sea

sources.quote: Three of the Emma's men, including Capt. Collins and First Mate Green, were killed
sources.context: Chapter 3, The Madness from the Sea
